data.title: SMCI Stock Falls Nearly 5% In Wednesday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) stock declined 4.98% during the pre-market trading session on Wednesday company's Q3 results failed to meet analyst expectations.

data.title: Asia Markets Gain, Europe Slides And Gold Retreats - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: Trump's tariff uncertainty and Fed's upcoming decision weigh on US markets. Trade deficit rises, while Asian and European markets show mixed results.

data.title: Bill Ackman Proposes Gradual China Tariff Escalation To Push Fair Trade And Avoid Economic Shock: 'This Approach Would Incentivize Companies...'
data.description: Billionaire Bill Ackman proposed that Trump implement a gradual, escalating China tariff plan to push fair trade talks.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher Ahead Of Fed's Verdict On Interest Rates: 'A Short Bout Of Stagflation Is Likely,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Wednesday after two days of decline on Tuesday. Futures of major benchmark indices were higher in premarket.

data.title: Amazon's Tesla Robotaxi Rival Zoox Recalls 270 Driverless Vehicles Following Las Vegas Crash In April: Report
data.description: Amazon's Zoox recalls 270 vehicles due to software issue causing crash. AV sector sees growth with Waymo, Tesla and Uber.
